headlines.headline: Arnik Commerce reports rising costs pressuring margins in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly impacting margins is a clear negative signal for profitability in the near and medium term.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
